files.content:
import novamind_api as nm

# Check billing mod distribution for upcoming week
r = nm.query("""SELECT billing_day_mod30, COUNT(*) as n FROM subscriptions 
WHERE status = 'subscribed' GROUP BY billing_day_mod30 ORDER BY billing_day_mod30""")
print('=== All billing mod distribution ===')
for row in r['rows']:
    print(f"mod {row['billing_day_mod30']:2d}: {row['n']}")

# Day 224 mod 30 = 14
print(f'\nDay 224 mod 30 = {224 % 30}')
# Wk32 bills (d224-230): mod 14,15,16,17,18,19,20
r2 = nm.query("""SELECT billing_day_mod30, COUNT(*) as n FROM subscriptions 
WHERE status = 'subscribed' AND billing_day_mod30 IN (14,15,16,17,18,19,20)
GROUP BY billing_day_mod30 ORDER BY billing_day_mod30""")
print('\n=== Wk32 bills (d224-230, mods 14-20) ===')
total = 0
for row in r2['rows']:
    print(f"mod {row['billing_day_mod30']:2d}: {row['n']}")
    total += row['n']
print(f'Total bills: {total}')

# Wk33 bills (d231-237): mod 21,22,23,24,25,26,27
r3 = nm.query("""SELECT billing_day_mod30, COUNT(*) as n FROM subscriptions 
WHERE status = 'subscribed' AND billing_day_mod30 IN (21,22,23,24,25,26,27)
GROUP BY billing_day_mod30 ORDER BY billing_day_mod30""")
print('\n=== Wk33 bills (d231-237, mods 21-27) ===')
total33 = 0
for row in r3['rows']:
    print(f"mod {row['billing_day_mod30']:2d}: {row['n']}")
    total33 += row['n']
print(f'Total bills: {total33}')

# Wk34 bills (d238-244): mod 28,29,0,1,2,3,4
r4 = nm.query("""SELECT billing_day_mod30, COUNT(*) as n FROM subscriptions 
WHERE status = 'subscribed' AND billing_day_mod30 IN (28,29,0,1,2,3,4)
GROUP BY billing_day_mod30 ORDER BY billing_day_mod30""")
print('\n=== Wk34 bills (d238-244, mods 28,29,0-4) ===')
total34 = 0
for row in r4['rows']:
    print(f"mod {row['billing_day_mod30']:2d}: {row['n']}")
    total34 += row['n']
print(f'Total bills: {total34}')

import novamind_api as nm

# Check issue age distribution (open issues for subscribed customers)
r = nm.query("""SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN (224 - open_day) < 2 THEN '0-2d'
        WHEN (224 - open_day) < 5 THEN '2-5d'
        WHEN (224 - open_day) < 10 THEN '5-10d'
        ELSE '10d+'
    END as age,
    COUNT(*) as n
FROM issues i 
JOIN subscriptions s ON i.customer_id = s.customer_id
WHERE i.status = 'open' AND s.status = 'subscribed'
GROUP BY age ORDER BY age""")
print('=== Open issues by age ===')
for row in r['rows']:
    print(f"{row['age']}: {row['n']}")

# Any really old issues?
r2 = nm.query("""SELECT COUNT(*) as n, AVG(224 - open_day) as avg_age, MAX(224 - open_day) as max_age 
FROM issues i JOIN subscriptions s ON i.customer_id = s.customer_id
WHERE i.status = 'open' AND s.status = 'subscribed'""")
for row in r2['rows']:
    print(f"\nOpen (subscribed): {row['n']}, avg age={row['avg_age']:.1f}d, max={row['max_age']}d")

# Research project status
r3 = nm.query("""SELECT * FROM research_projects WHERE status='in_progress' OR status='completed' ORDER BY start_day DESC LIMIT 10""")
print('\n=== Research projects ===')
for row in r3['rows']:
    print(row)

import novamind_api as nm

# Check age buckets for wk32 bills
r = nm.query("""SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN (224 - s.start_day) < 150 THEN 'pre-150d'
        WHEN (224 - s.start_day) < 175 THEN '150-175d'
        WHEN (224 - s.start_day) < 190 THEN '175-190d'
        ELSE '190d+' 
    END as age_bucket,
    s.plan,
    COUNT(*) as n
FROM subscriptions s
WHERE s.status = 'subscribed' AND s.billing_day_mod30 IN (14,15,16,17,18,19,20)
GROUP BY age_bucket, s.plan ORDER BY age_bucket, s.plan""")
print('=== Wk32 age buckets (49 bills) ===')
for row in r['rows']:
    print(f"{row['age_bucket']:12s} {row['plan']}: {row['n']}")

# Overall subscription status counts
r2 = nm.query("""SELECT status, COUNT(*) as n FROM subscriptions GROUP BY status""")
print('\n=== All subs by status ===')
for row in r2['rows']:
    print(f"{row['status']}: {row['n']}")

# Recent lead conversion check
r3 = nm.query("""SELECT status, COUNT(*) as n FROM subscriptions 
WHERE start_day >= 217 GROUP BY status""")
print('\n=== Wk31 leads (start_day >= 217) by status ===')
for row in r3['rows']:
    print(f"{row['status']}: {row['n']}")

# Open issues for subscribed customers
r4 = nm.query("""SELECT i.status, COUNT(*) as n FROM issues i 
JOIN customers c ON i.customer_id = c.customer_id 
JOIN subscriptions s ON c.customer_id = s.customer_id
WHERE s.status = 'subscribed' AND i.status = 'open'
GROUP BY i.status""")
print('\n=== Open issues (subscribed customers) ===')
for row in r4['rows']:
    print(f"{row['status']}: {row['n']}")

# Issues resolved/opened last 7 days
r5 = nm.query("""SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN open_day >= 217 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as opened_last_wk,
    SUM(CASE WHEN resolved_day >= 217 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as resolved_last_wk
FROM issues""")
print(f"\n=== Issue flow wk31 ===")
for row in r5['rows']:
    print(f"Opened: {row['opened_last_wk']}, Resolved: {row['resolved_last_wk']}")

# Social posts last 7 days
r6 = nm.query("""SELECT day, substr(content, 1, 120) as snippet FROM social_media_posts
WHERE day >= 217 ORDER BY day DESC LIMIT 25""")
print('\n=== Recent social posts (last 7 days) ===')
for row in r6['rows']:
    print(f"d{row['day']}: {row['snippet']}")

import novamind_api as nm

# Check for competitor events in recent posts
r = nm.query("""SELECT day, substr(content, 1, 200) as snippet FROM social_media_posts
WHERE day >= 210 AND (content LIKE '%RivalTech%' OR content LIKE '%competitor%' OR 
content LIKE '%launch%' OR content LIKE '%GPT%' OR content LIKE '%Claude%' OR
content LIKE '%release%' OR content LIKE '%announce%')
ORDER BY day DESC LIMIT 30""")
print('=== Competitor-related posts (last 14d) ===')
for row in r['rows']:
    print(f"d{row['day']}: {row['snippet']}")

# Check cancellation reasons from wk31
r2 = nm.query("""SELECT COUNT(*) as n, 
    AVG(224 - start_day) as avg_age,
    MIN(224 - start_day) as min_age,
    MAX(224 - start_day) as max_age
FROM subscriptions WHERE status = 'cancelled' AND end_day >= 217""")
print('\n=== Wk31 cancellations ===')
for row in r2['rows']:
    print(f"n={row['n']}, avg age={row['avg_age']:.0f}, range={row['min_age']}-{row['max_age']}")

# Compare last week's cancels to issues
r3 = nm.query("""SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN (end_day - start_day) < 150 THEN 'pre-150d'
        WHEN (end_day - start_day) < 175 THEN '150-175d'
        WHEN (end_day - start_day) < 190 THEN '175-190d'
        ELSE '190d+' 
    END as age_bucket,
    COUNT(*) as n
FROM subscriptions WHERE status = 'cancelled' AND end_day >= 217
GROUP BY age_bucket ORDER BY age_bucket""")
print('\n=== Wk31 cancels by age at cancellation ===')
for row in r3['rows']:
    print(f"{row['age_bucket']}: {row['n']}")

# Historical success rate by age (last 4 weeks)
r4 = nm.query("""SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN (end_day - start_day) < 150 THEN 'pre-150d'
        WHEN (end_day - start_day) < 175 THEN '150-175d'
        WHEN (end_day - start_day) < 190 THEN '175-190d'
        ELSE '190d+' 
    END as age_bucket,
    COUNT(*) as n
FROM subscriptions WHERE status = 'cancelled' AND end_day >= 196
GROUP BY age_bucket ORDER BY age_bucket""")
print('\n=== Last 4wk cancels by age ===')
for row in r4['rows']:
    print(f"{row['age_bucket']}: {row['n']}")

import novamind_api as nm

# Look for actual competitor events (not customer posts)
r = nm.query("""SELECT day, substr(content, 1, 250) as snippet FROM social_media_posts
WHERE day >= 210 ORDER BY day DESC LIMIT 60""")
print('=== All recent posts ===')
for row in r['rows']:
    print(f"d{row['day']}: {row['snippet'][:180]}")

# Also check enterprise threads
r2 = nm.query("""SELECT COUNT(*) as n FROM enterprise_turns WHERE closed=0""")
print(f"\n=== Open enterprise turns: {r2['rows'][0]['n']} ===")

import novamind_api as nm

# Check actual daily usage per subscriber
total_usage = 45435  # this week's total
num_subs = 293
avg_per_sub_per_day = total_usage / num_subs / 7
print(f'Total usage wk31: {total_usage} over 7 days')
print(f'Subs: {num_subs}')
print(f'Avg usage/sub/day: {avg_per_sub_per_day:.1f}')
print(f'Current Plan A quota: 800/day')
print(f'Capacity Tier 0 limit: ~50K/day (estimated)')

# Check peak daily usage
r = nm.query("""SELECT day, SUM(usage) as total FROM daily_usage_events 
WHERE day >= 217 GROUP BY day ORDER BY day""")
print('\n=== Daily usage last 7 days ===')
for row in r['rows']:
    print(f"d{row['day']}: {row['total']}")

import novamind_api as nm

# Get total daily usage
r = nm.query("""SELECT day, SUM(usage_units) as total, COUNT(*) as n_customers,
    AVG(usage_units) as avg_use, MAX(usage_units) as max_use
FROM daily_usage WHERE day >= 217 GROUP BY day ORDER BY day""")
print('=== Daily usage last 7 days ===')
for row in r['rows']:
    print(f"d{row['day']}: total={row['total']}, n={row['n_customers']}, avg={row['avg_use']:.1f}, max={row['max_use']}")

# How many hit >=quota on a given day?
r2 = nm.query("""SELECT day, COUNT(*) as at_cap FROM daily_usage 
WHERE day >= 217 AND usage_units >= 800 GROUP BY day ORDER BY day""")
print('\n=== Customers hitting 800/day cap last 7d ===')
for row in r2['rows']:
    print(f"d{row['day']}: {row['at_cap']} at/over cap")

# >= 600
r3 = nm.query("""SELECT day, COUNT(*) as at_cap FROM daily_usage 
WHERE day >= 217 AND usage_units >= 600 GROUP BY day ORDER BY day""")
print('\n=== Customers >=600 (Plan B cap) last 7d ===')
for row in r3['rows']:
    print(f"d{row['day']}: {row['at_cap']}")

import novamind_api as nm

# Age buckets for wk33 (d231-237, mods 21-27)
r = nm.query("""SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN (231 - s.start_day) < 150 THEN 'pre-150d'
        WHEN (231 - s.start_day) < 175 THEN '150-175d'
        WHEN (231 - s.start_day) < 190 THEN '175-190d'
        ELSE '190d+' 
    END as age_bucket,
    s.plan,
    COUNT(*) as n
FROM subscriptions s
WHERE s.status = 'subscribed' AND s.billing_day_mod30 IN (21,22,23,24,25,26,27)
GROUP BY age_bucket, s.plan ORDER BY age_bucket, s.plan""")
print('=== Wk33 age buckets (76 bills) ===')
for row in r['rows']:
    print(f"{row['age_bucket']:12s} {row['plan']}: {row['n']}")

# Age buckets for wk34 (d238-244, mods 28,29,0-4)
r = nm.query("""SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN (238 - s.start_day) < 150 THEN 'pre-150d'
        WHEN (238 - s.start_day) < 175 THEN '150-175d'
        WHEN (238 - s.start_day) < 190 THEN '175-190d'
        ELSE '190d+' 
    END as age_bucket,
    s.plan,
    COUNT(*) as n
FROM subscriptions s
WHERE s.status = 'subscribed' AND s.billing_day_mod30 IN (28,29,0,1,2,3,4)
GROUP BY age_bucket, s.plan ORDER BY age_bucket, s.plan""")
print('\n=== Wk34 age buckets (95 bills) ===')
for row in r['rows']:
    print(f"{row['age_bucket']:12s} {row['plan']}: {row['n']}")

# Wk35 bills
r = nm.query("""SELECT billing_day_mod30, COUNT(*) as n FROM subscriptions 
WHERE status = 'subscribed' AND billing_day_mod30 IN (5,6,7,8,9,10,11)
GROUP BY billing_day_mod30 ORDER BY billing_day_mod30""")
print('\n=== Wk35 bills (mods 5-11) ===')
total35 = 0
for row in r['rows']:
    print(f"mod {row['billing_day_mod30']:2d}: {row['n']}")
    total35 += row['n']
print(f'Total: {total35}')

# Current plan distribution
r = nm.query("""SELECT plan, COUNT(*) as n, AVG(effective_price) as avg_price 
FROM subscriptions WHERE status='subscribed' GROUP BY plan""")
print('\n=== Active plans ===')
for row in r['rows']:
    print(f"{row['plan']}: {row['n']} @ ${row['avg_price']:.2f}")

import novamind_api as nm

# Wk31 success rate by age bucket (subs still subscribed vs cancelled among those billed)
# Bills wk31 were mods 7-13 (day 217 mod 30 = 7)
print(f'Day 217 mod 30 = {217 % 30}')

# Anyone with billing_day_mod30 in 7-13 either still subscribed or cancelled in wk31
r = nm.query("""SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN (217 - start_day) < 150 THEN 'pre-150d'
        WHEN (217 - start_day) < 175 THEN '150-175d'
        WHEN (217 - start_day) < 190 THEN '175-190d'
        ELSE '190d+' 
    END as age_bucket,
    status,
    COUNT(*) as n
FROM subscriptions 
WHERE billing_day_mod30 IN (7,8,9,10,11,12,13) 
  AND (status = 'subscribed' OR (status = 'cancelled' AND end_day >= 217 AND end_day < 224))
GROUP BY age_bucket, status ORDER BY age_bucket, status""")
print('\n=== Wk31 bill outcomes by age bucket ===')
for row in r['rows']:
    print(f"{row['age_bucket']:12s} {row['status']}: {row['n']}")

# Full totals  
r2 = nm.query("""SELECT status, COUNT(*) as n FROM subscriptions 
WHERE billing_day_mod30 IN (7,8,9,10,11,12,13) 
AND (status = 'subscribed' OR (status = 'cancelled' AND end_day >= 217 AND end_day < 224))
GROUP BY status""")
print('\n=== Wk31 totals ===')
for row in r2['rows']:
    print(f"{row['status']}: {row['n']}")
